positive: A mystical, cosmic forest scene. Central composition featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna under a deep twilight sky. Giant, stylized mushrooms with vibrant jewel tones illuminate the forest floor, contrasting against deep indigo and emerald greens. Silhouette of a majestic deer drinking from a shimmering portal stream. Abstract celestial elements like nebula dust and distant constellations gently bleed into the foliage. Highly stylized graphic style, inspired by Art Nouveau and cosmic psychedelia. Crisp linework, strong contrast between glowing elements and dark background. Minimalist negative space around the central subjects. Vector illustration quality, perfect for t-shirt printing, clean edges, high saturation, 8k resolution.
negative: blur, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, low contrast, dirty, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, poorly drawn hands, human faces
